title: OE roadmap – scaling OEs
title_translation: 光电器件路线图——光电器件扩容

paragraphs.source: The Optical Engines available today typically offer between 1.6T and 3.2T of aggregate bandwidth. Nvidia’s Quantum CPO includes a 1.6T engine, with a 3.2T version planned for Spectrum. Broadcom has shown off their 6.4T OE for Bailly, but the form factor is very big (2-3x the width of Nvidia) and it requires two FAUs so its bandwidth density may be similar to what Nvidia’s offering. This is the same case for Marvell’s 6.4T OE, requiring 2 FAUs, so it occupies a large footprint. Marvell’s OE is not going into any production systems that we know of anytime soon either.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The Optical Engines available today typically offer between 1.6T and 3.2T of aggregate bandwidth. Nvidia’s Quantum CPO includes a 1.6T engine, with a 3.2T version planned for Spectrum. Broadcom has shown off their 6.4T OE for Bailly, but the form factor is very big (2-3x the width of Nvidia) and it requires two FAUs so its bandwidth density may be similar to what Nvidia’s offering. This is the same case for Marvell’s 6.4T OE, requiring 2 FAUs, so it occupies a large footprint. Marvell’s OE is not going into any production systems that we know of anytime soon either.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The Optical Engines available today typically offer between 1.6T and 3.2T of aggregate bandwidth. Nvidia’s Quantum CPO includes a 1.6T engine, with a 3.2T version planned for Spectrum. Broadcom has shown off their 6.4T OE for Bailly, but the form factor is very big (2-3x the width of Nvidia) and it requires two FAUs so its bandwidth density may be similar to what Nvidia’s offering. This is the same case for Marvell’s 6.4T OE, requiring 2 FAUs, so it occupies a large footprint. Marvell’s OE is not going into any production systems that we know of anytime soon either.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**

目前可用的光引擎（Optical Engine，OE）通常提供1.6T至3.2T的聚合带宽。英伟达的Quantum CPO包含一个1.6T光引擎，并计划为Spectrum推出3.2T版本。博通已展示其用于Bailly的6.4T OE，但外形尺寸非常大（宽度是英伟达的2-3倍），且需要两个光纤阵列单元（Fiber Array Unit，FAU），因此其带宽密度可能与英伟达的产品相当。Marvell的6.4T OE同样需要2个FAU，占用空间显著更大。据我们所知，Marvell的OE短期内也不会进入任何量产系统。

issues.description: 术语翻译与术语表不一致，未使用'光引擎(OE)'
关键技术术语'bandwidth density'被错译为'边缘带宽密度'
FAU缩写首次出现未提供全称和中文解释
句子过长且存在翻译腔，'边缘带宽密度'重复错误
用词可更自然，'面积'用于光学引擎显得不够精准
翻译腔较明显，可采用更符合中文科技报道的表达
直译痕迹明显，'with a free hand'可更地道

paragraphs.source: As we’ve discussed, the 3.2T OE implementation in Nvidia’s Spectrum-X photonics switches does not offer more shoreline bandwidth density than pluggables that are driven by long reach SerDes. In other words, optical engine density must scale multiple times to deliver a compelling performance advantage and drive customer adoption. This means scaling both the electrical interface between the host silicon and the OE EIC, as well as scaling the amount of bandwidth coming out of the fibers.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As we’ve discussed, the 3.2T OE implementation in Nvidia’s Spectrum-X photonics switches does not offer more shoreline bandwidth density than pluggables that are driven by long reach SerDes. In other words, optical engine density must scale multiple times to deliver a compelling performance advantage and drive customer adoption. This means scaling both the electrical interface between the host silicon and the OE EIC, as well as scaling the amount of bandwidth coming out of the fibers.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As we’ve discussed, the 3.2T OE implementation in Nvidia’s Spectrum-X photonics switches does not offer more shoreline bandwidth density than pluggables that are driven by long reach SerDes. In other words, optical engine density must scale multiple times to deliver a compelling performance advantage and drive customer adoption. This means scaling both the electrical interface between the host silicon and the OE EIC, as well as scaling the amount of bandwidth coming out of the fibers.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**

如前所述，英伟达Spectrum-X光子交换机中采用的3.2T光引擎，并未在边缘带宽密度上超越使用长距SerDes的可插拔光模块。换句话说，光引擎的密度必须实现多次提升，才能带来显著的性能优势并推动客户采用。这意味着需要同时扩展主机硅芯片与OE EIC之间的电接口，以及从光纤输出的带宽总量。

paragraphs.source: But what if we were able to design the next generation of interconnect with a free hand – what could be approaches for unlocking greater bandwidth for this generation and beyond?
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: But what if we were able to design the next generation of interconnect with a free hand – what could be approaches for unlocking greater bandwidth for this generation and beyond?
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: But what if we were able to design the next generation of interconnect with a free hand – what could be approaches for unlocking greater bandwidth for this generation and beyond?

pro.text: 但如果我们能放开手脚设计下一代互连技术，又有哪些方法可以为这一代及未来世代解锁更大的带宽呢？
